title: New-Media Arts Protocol to study Stem Cells (NMAP-SC)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"bj3jr","text":"This protocol aims at building a methodological synthesis to understand cancerous cells not only by bio lab’s facilities but also by new-media arts lab’s tools, applications, and vision. The template illustrates potential technical, conceptual, and aesthetic inputs derived from the new-media arts lab. On the other hand, three output channels have been emphasized to contribute to the core of the stem cells research, public engagement, and the core of the research in new-media arts.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
